title: poa pringlei var. hansenii
intro: Poa pringlei var. hansenii, also known as the Alpine Bluegrass, is a rare and unique variety of the Poa pringlei plant, specifically found in high-altitude regions. As a medicinal plant, Poa pringlei var. hansenii has been used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote tissue repair, and boost the immune system, while also exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. Poa pringlei var. hansenii can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and salves, which are often used to treat topical issues and promote overall well-being.
